title: crataegus sanguinea var. chlorocarpa
intro: Crataegus sanguinea var. chlorocarpa, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crataegus sanguinea var. chlorocarpa include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
